# mailcow_tls_policy_map (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mailcow_tls_policy_map" "enforce" {
  dest   = "example.com"
  policy = "encrypt"
  active = true
}

resource "mailcow_tls_policy_map" "dane" {
  dest       = "secure.example.com"
  policy     = "dane"
  parameters = "match=nexthop"
  active     = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `dest` (String) Target domain or email address for the TLS policy
- `policy` (String) TLS policy: none, may, encrypt, dane, fingerprint, verify, or secure

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean) Whether this TLS policy map entry is active
- `parameters` (String) Additional Postfix TLS parameters (key=value pairs separated by spaces)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
